channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: ConservativeHome: Our Survey: Tories expect Burnham to lead Labour to the next election but would 'prefer' Starmer did
item.description: Our Survey: Tories expect Burnham to lead Labour to the next election but would 'prefer' Starmer did

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: PM will not block Burnham from by-election despite paving way for Labour leadership challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: PM will not block Burnham from by-election despite paving way for Labour leadership challenge

item.title: i Politics: The Chancellor City insiders would fear the most
item.description: The Chancellor City insiders would fear the most

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer braces for leadership challenge by Burnham
item.description: Starmer braces for leadership challenge by Burnham

item.title: The Guardian: If Labour didn’t exist, would you invent it? Streeting, Rayner, Burnham – you need to tell us why - The Guardian

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: 👇 I think what some of the commentary on “Starmer will be hoping or is the beneficiary of a plot where Andy Burnham loses Makerfield” is Andy Burnham is crazy popular in the North West, and if he can’t win there (sca...
